testsuite.name: Computhink.Script.Galadari_PDFSignature

testcase.name: Login_EWA
testcase.system-out: EWA URL launched successfull Scenario 01: Log into a EWA Enter valid user name into username field UserName Details: cvadmin Enter valid password into password field Select a Room Selected Room name: SERVER.ORA_ROOM1 Captcha is not present, proceeding with login. Click Login button Session for user is already active. Do you want to create a new session? Dialog box displayed. User clicks OK button. Session message did not appear. Proceeding with login. User has logged in successfully.

testcase.name: TC_01_Create_and_Open_document_Default_View
testcase.system-out: Navigate till Cabinet Navigate till Drawer Navigate till Folder Check one by one document Total Checkboxes : 64 Move to the Document Tab Click on the Send To workflow Select Workflow and send document to workflow Mousehover Todolist tab Select New Items Open documents Add signature on the page and verify it's added Click on the Accept workflow action Click on Username option Click on Logout option Timeout waiting for alert to appear.
